DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Victor de Gyarfas, Esq. of MAYER, BROWN, ROWE & MAW 213/229-9500 for defendant DOCENT, INC. demurring party

Mr. de Gyarfas did not give notice of intent to argue. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows -- defendant DOCENT, INC.'s demurrer overruled. Request for judicial notice is denied. 20 days leave to answer. Mr. de Gyarfas to give notice re time to answer. (JJM/cl) Carol A. Karen, CSR 8189
